name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Translate on-screen video text into any language without rebuilding your visuals.
problem: Businesses producing video content for global audiences face the costly, time-consuming challenge of recreating graphics and overlays for each target language. Visual Translate eliminates the need to rebuild visual assets by detecting and replacing on-screen text in place. This lets teams localize video content at scale without involving designers or editors.
useCases: Localizing marketing videos for international markets without redesigning graphics
Translating e-learning course overlays and captions into multiple languages
Adapting social media video content for regional audiences quickly
Converting product demo videos with on-screen UI text for foreign-language customers
